docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BRODY, FINBAR PRECISION ENGINEERING INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BROWN, EARL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BRODY, FINBAR PRECISION ENGINEERING INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,565.92 FILED BY BROWN, EARL AS TO DEFENDANT BRODY, FINBAR PRECISION ENGINEERING INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-30-2014 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 45.00- SERVED JUL-02-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BRODY, FINBAR PRECISION ENGINEERING INC.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2015 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-30-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-30-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF EARL BROWN WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FINBAR BRODY WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-30-2014 - JUDGMENT.
